const grid = document.getElementById("grid"); const empty = document.getElementById("empty"); const q = document.getElementById("q"); const cat = document.getElementById("cat"); const count = document.getElementById("count"); const player = document.getElementById("player"); const frame = document.getElementById("frame"); const playerTitle = document.getElementById("player-title"); const back = document.getElementById("back"); const openBtn = document.getElementById("open"); let current = null;
const genres = Array.from(new Set(GAMES.map(function(g) { return g.g; }))).sort(function(a,b) { return a.localeCompare(b); }); for (var i = 0; i < genres.length; i++) { var o = document.createElement("option"); o.value = genres[i]; o.textContent = genres[i]; cat.appendChild(o); }
function filtered() { var needle = q.value.trim().toLowerCase(); var genre = cat.value; return GAMES.filter(function(g) { if (genre && g.g !== genre) return false; if (!needle) return true; return (g.t + " " + g.g + " " + (g.s||"")).toLowerCase().indexOf(needle) !== -1; }); }
function render() { var list = filtered(); count.textContent = list.length + " / " + GAMES.length; grid.innerHTML = ""; if (list.length) empty.classList.remove("show"); else empty.classList.add("show"); var frag = document.createDocumentFragment(); for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) { (function(g) { var card = document.createElement("article"); card.setAttribute("class", "card"); card.tabIndex = 0; var imgHtml = g.i ? ('<img loading="lazy" decoding="async" alt="" src="' + String(g.i).replace(/&/g,"&").replace(/"/g,""") + '" />') : ""; card.innerHTML = imgHtml + '<div class="meta"><div class="title"></div><div class="genre"></div></div>'; card.querySelector(".title").textContent = g.t; card.querySelector(".genre").textContent = g.g; card.addEventListener("click", function() { play(g); }); card.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) { if (e.key === "Enter" || e.key === " ") { e.preventDefault(); play(g); } }); frag.appendChild(card); })(list[i]); } grid.appendChild(frag); }
function play(g) { current = g; playerTitle.textContent = g.t; frame.setAttribute("src", g.p); player.setAttribute("class", "open"); player.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false"); try { history.pushState({ play: g.s || g.t }, "", "#play"); } catch (e) {} }
function closePlayer() { player.removeAttribute("class"); player.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true"); frame.setAttribute("src", "about:blank"); current = null; }
back.addEventListener("click", closePlayer); openBtn.addEventListener("click", function() { if (current && current.p) window.open(current.p, "_blank", "noopener,noreferrer"); }); window.addEventListener("popstate", function() { if (player.getAttribute("class") === "open") closePlayer(); }); q.addEventListener("input", render); cat.addEventListener("change", render); render();
